payload.answer: The prior output should be treated as invalid/unsafe for this fixture. Escalate to a stronger model or reject the proposal; do not commit any memory update from it.
citations: Input: "Cheap model output invalid schema or unsafe proposal Expected escalation to stronger model or safe reject"
Role contract: "Generate repair/user-choice options only; do not decide, commit, append, merge, overwrite, supersede, or mark anything as saved."
repair_options: Safe reject the proposal and keep the existing memory unchanged.
Escalate the same input to a stronger model for a fresh repair suggestion.
Request a schema-compliant re-emit with only repair options and no committed memory changes.
